title: bridge-jmap: email text body capped at 8192 bytes but nie pad limit is larger
description: email_get (jmap.rs:333) sets maxBodyValueBytes: 8192. This is the JMAP-level cap on how much body text is fetched. If the email has a longer plain text body, only the first 8192 bytes arrive (JMAP sets isTruncated: true on the bodyValues entry). The bridge silently forwards the truncated text to nie without indicating truncation to the nie recipient. The email originator sees their full email forwarded; the nie recipient sees only the first 8KB with no ellipsis or truncation marker. Should either raise the limit, or append '[truncated]' when bodyValues[partId].isTruncated is true.
